# .github

- reviewdog.yaml builds sisakulint itself on every PR and dogfoods it over all workflows via SARIF. Workflow edits that violate sisakulint's own rules (commit SHA pinning of actions, explicit permissions) get flagged automatically on the PR.
- CI.yaml only shows the gofmt diff; it runs no tests or linters and never fails. Local go test ./... is the only behavioral guarantee.
- Releases fire from release.yml on a v*.*.* tag push (goreleaser plus a Homebrew tap update, which needs the TAP_GITHUB_TOKEN PAT). The tap target still disagrees between release.yml (ultra-supara/...) and .goreleaser.yml (sisaku-security/...).
- The effective config is .github/sisakulint.yaml. The action.yaml generated by -init is never read and is gitignored.
